reference: Dear patient, you have sustained blunt trauma to your arm with a contusion. I would advise obtaining X-rays of the involved arm in anteroposterior and lateral views to rule out bony abnormalities. If the results are normal, a fracture can be ruled out. Apply ice packs to the swelling frequently. Start taking a combination of Diclofenac and Serratiopeptidase twice a day for seven days. Keep the limb elevated. This will relieve you of pain and swelling. All the best.
text: Dear patient, you have sustained blunt trauma to your arm with a contusion. I would advise obtaining X-rays of the involved arm in antero-posterior and lateral views to rule out bony abnormalities. If the results are normal, a fracture can be ruled out. Apply ice packs to the swelling frequently. Start taking a combination of diclofenac and seroepidates twice a day for seven days. Keep the limb elevated. This will relieve you of pain and swelling. All the best.
